hyperedges.description: remove_gameplay_tag takes GameplayTagContainer and GameplayTag as parameters
matches_tag takes two GameplayTag parameters and returns bool
has_tag takes GameplayTagContainer, GameplayTag, and exact_match bool, returns bool
has_any_tags takes two GameplayTagContainer and exact_match bool, returns bool
has_all_tags takes two GameplayTagContainer and exact_match bool, returns bool
on_burst takes Actor, GameplayCueParameters, and GameplayCueNotify_SpawnResult
OnPontoonEnteredWater delegate signature takes SphericalPontoon parameter
Computes alpha, beta, and gamma angles from sides a, b, and c using law of cosine
SoundModulationDefaultRoutingSettings manages volume, pitch, highpass, and lowpass modulation destinations
SoundModulationDefaultRoutingSettings manages routing for volume, pitch, highpass, and lowpass
FBIKDebugOption controls debug drawing for axes, constraints, effector, and hierarchy
GameplayCueNotify_Burst configures burst effects, placement, and spawn conditions
EarthPointFragment represents a point in space with transform, validity, and component data
LightEntity contains lighting-related components and materials
